description: You are a backend engineer at a scheduling SaaS. The Python library `pycal_importer` at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/pycal_importer` is failing to ingest complex iCalendar (.ics) files. Fix the bugs in `pycal_importer/parser.py` so that it complies with RFC 5545 and passes the test suite in the tests/ directory. Reported issues include truncated long descriptions due to line folding, failures parsing events with timezones (DTSTART;TZID=...), and crashes on all-day events.
